evals.description: Triggers on request to build location pages at scale
evals.prompt: I want to build SEO pages for every city in the US for our accounting software. How should I approach this?

evals.description: Triggers on programmatic SEO mention with comparison pages
evals.prompt: We want to create programmatic comparison pages like 'Tool A vs Tool B' for all combinations of our competitors. What do I need to know?

evals.description: Can generate Next.js generateStaticParams for a pSEO page
evals.prompt: Write a Next.js App Router page with generateStaticParams that generates city+service pages from a database. Include a quality gate to skip thin pages.

evals.description: Can implement a quality scoring function for pSEO pages
evals.prompt: Write a TypeScript function that scores a location pSEO page from 0-100 and blocks pages below a minimum threshold from being published.

evals.description: Can implement a related pages algorithm for geographic proximity
evals.prompt: Implement a function that finds related location pages for a city pSEO page - prioritize same state, same service, then fall back to other states.

evals.description: Can explain and implement a sitemap index for large pSEO sites
evals.prompt: Our pSEO site will have 200,000 pages. How do I set up sitemaps correctly? Write the Next.js route handler.

evals.description: Can describe the seed-and-scale launch strategy
evals.prompt: How many pSEO pages should I publish on day one and what is the right approach to scaling up?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns against cookie-cutter pages with only keyword swap
evals.prompt: I have 10,000 city pages where I just change the city name in the title and H1. The rest of the content is identical. Is this good pSEO?

assertions.value: yes, that is a good approach

evals.description: Gotcha: explains doorway page penalty and how to avoid it
evals.prompt: What exactly is a doorway page penalty from Google and how do I make sure my programmatic pages don't get hit by it?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not invent a Google pSEO whitelist API
evals.prompt: Is there a Google API I can call to pre-approve my programmatic pages for indexing before I publish them?

evals.description: References internal-linking-automation.md for internal linking task
evals.prompt: I need to implement automated internal linking between all my city pSEO pages. Where do I start and what patterns should I use?
